meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for Xiaomi repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: Xiaomi Repair Winnipeg | Redmi & POCO Screen Fix | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: Xiaomi repair specialists in Winnipeg – no local competition! Screen, battery, fast charging repair for Xiaomi 14, 13, Redmi Note, POCO & all models.
page.h1: Xiaomi, Redmi & POCO Repair in Winnipeg
page.heroDescription: Can't find anyone in Winnipeg to repair your Xiaomi? We've got you covered. From flagship Xiaomi 15 Ultra to budget Redmi devices and performance POCO phones.

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: AMOLED and LCD display replacements for Xiaomi, Redmi, and POCO devices.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Restore full-day battery life. Same-day replacement for most models.

services.name: Fast Charging Repair
services.description: HyperCharge 120W, Turbo Charge, and 67W fast charging port repair.

services.name: Camera Repair
services.description: Leica-partnered camera repairs on Xiaomi flagships.

services.name: Speaker Repair
services.description: Fix speakers, earpieces, and Harman Kardon audio systems.

services.name: Port & Connector Repair
services.description: USB-C port, SIM tray, and headphone jack repairs.

advantage_pillars.title: Winnipeg's Xiaomi Specialists
advantage_pillars.description: Most local shops turn away Xiaomi devices. We've invested in parts sourcing and training.

advantage_pillars.title: Parts We Can Source
advantage_pillars.description: We maintain supplier relationships for Xiaomi, Redmi, and POCO parts.

advantage_pillars.title: HyperCharge Experts
advantage_pillars.description: We diagnose and repair 120W HyperCharge, 67W Turbo Charge, and all fast charging systems.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty. Lifetime warranty on most other repairs.

model_categories.title: Xiaomi Flagship
model_categories.description: Premium Xiaomi phones with Leica cameras.

model_categories.title: Redmi & Mix Fold
model_categories.description: Budget Redmi devices and foldable Mix repairs.

models_description: We repair all Xiaomi, Redmi, and POCO devices.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: Xiaomi repair costs vary widely. Xiaomi's global support portal provides battery health guidance.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers expect Xiaomi repairs to be cheap, but flagships can cost as much as Samsung. iFixit's Xiaomi teardowns show the complexity.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost approaches your device's value, we'll explain that clearly.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair doesn't make sense, data recovery is often still possible.

faqs.question: Do you repair Xiaomi phones in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Yes! We're one of the few repair shops in Winnipeg that services Xiaomi, Redmi, and POCO devices.

faqs.question: How long does Xiaomi screen repair take in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Most Xiaomi screen replacements are completed same-day, typically within 2-3 hours.

faqs.question: Can you fix Xiaomi HyperCharge issues?
faqs.answer: Yes, we diagnose and repair HyperCharge 120W and all fast charging problems.

faqs.question: Are Xiaomi parts available in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: We maintain supplier relationships for Xiaomi parts.

faqs.question: Do you repair POCO and Redmi phones?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! POCO and Redmi are Xiaomi sub-brands. We service all models.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving Thompson, MB.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

cta.smsMessage: Hi, I found your site searching for Xiaomi repair. Can you help?

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
